# EphemeralPrivateKey

**Associated Type**

The type of the ephemeral private key.

## Declaration

associatedtype EphemeralPrivateKey : HPKEKEMPrivateKeyGeneration where Self == Self.EphemeralPrivateKey.PublicKey
